name: ES2017 Regex dotAll Compatibility
description: When tsconfig.json targets ES2017 or earlier, the regex /s (dotAll) flag is not available. Use new RegExp() constructor with [\s\S]* instead of .* to match across newlines. Also applies to /d (indices) and /v (unicodeSets) flags.

trigger.errorPattern: The 's' flag is not supported|dotAll.*not supported|RegExp.*flag.*not available
trigger.errorMessage: TypeScript error: The 's' (dotAll) regex flag is not supported when targeting ES2017

steps.description: Replace /pattern.*text/s with new RegExp('pattern[\\s\\S]*text', 'i'). Note: .* does not match newlines in new RegExp() either — must use [\\s\\S]* explicitly.
Check tsconfig.json target. ES2017 supports: g, i, m, u, y. ES2018 adds: s (dotAll). ES2022 adds: d (indices). ES2024 adds: v (unicodeSets).
